title: selinum alpinum
intro: Selinum alpinum, also known as Wild Celery or Alpine Celery, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the mountains of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selinum alpinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as a natural digestive aid. Selinum alpinum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a raw vegetable in salads, offering a unique and flavorful addition to herbal remedies.
